productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Red & Grey Techpack 35 Rucksack
description: Grey backpack with red highlights, branding and loop detail in the frontOne haul loop, two padded and adjustable shoulder straps with a click clasp connecting the two straps, and a padded waistband with adjustable straps and click clasp closureTwo main zipped compartments, one has a metal rod in the centre with Velcro closureTwo mesh pockets at the sides with elasticated rimsFirm back with padded panels for comfort, click clasps and strap and loop detail at the sides and base for a compressed fitWarranty: 5 yearsPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown.Warranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
